description: Eval cases for the InkBloop multi-agent system. Tests AI parsing, entity resolution, and end-to-end outcomes.

evals.context: One client named Sarah Kim exists
evals.resolution: Exact single match on 'sarah' → resolves to Sarah Kim
evals.expected_outcome: BookingForm opens pre-filled with client=Sarah Kim, date=next Friday 2pm

evals.prompt: create an appointment for Sam this saturday at 1 pm
evals.context: Two clients match 'Sam': Sam Donovan and Samuel Wright
evals.resolution: Multiple matches on 'sam' → shows client disambiguation cards for Sam Donovan and Samuel Wright
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Which Sam?' with two client cards. After tap, BookingForm opens with selected client + Saturday 1pm

evals.context: No client named Sandy exists
evals.resolution: No match on 'sandy' → shows no-match UI with fuzzy suggestions + create option
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'No exact match for sandy' with Create New Client button, fuzzy suggestions, and search field

evals.prompt: create an appt for cindy lou
evals.context: Client 'Cindy Liu' exists (voice-to-text error: 'lou' vs 'liu')
evals.resolution: No exact match on 'cindy lou' → fuzzy match finds 'Cindy Liu' as top suggestion
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows no-match UI with Cindy Liu as a smart suggestion

evals.prompt: book a consultation for friday morning
evals.context: No client name mentioned in prompt
evals.resolution: No client_name in entities → skip client resolution, proceed directly
evals.expected_outcome: BookingForm opens with type=Consultation, date=Friday, timeSlot=morning, no client pre-filled

evals.prompt: book chris martin for a full day session next wednesday, estimate 800 dollars, sleeve work on left arm
evals.context: Client Chris Martin exists (exact full name match)
evals.resolution: Exact match on 'chris martin' → resolves immediately
evals.expected_outcome: BookingForm opens with all fields pre-filled: client, date, type, estimate, notes

evals.context: Testing shorthand date parsing: '52' = May 2nd
evals.resolution: Single match on 'sarah' → resolves to Sarah Kim
evals.expected_outcome: BookingForm opens with client=Sarah Kim, date=May 2 at 3pm

evals.context: Sarah Kim has 2 upcoming bookings
evals.resolution: Single match on 'sarah' → resolves client → finds 2 bookings → shows booking cards
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Which booking?' with booking cards for Sarah's upcoming appointments

evals.context: Alex Torres has exactly 1 upcoming booking
evals.resolution: Single match on 'alex' → resolves client → finds exactly 1 booking → auto-opens
evals.expected_outcome: BookingDrawer opens directly showing Alex's booking details

evals.context: One booking exists on Friday
evals.resolution: No client name → skip client resolution → filter bookings by date → one match → auto-opens
evals.expected_outcome: BookingDrawer opens for the Friday booking

evals.prompt: do I have an appointment for cindy
evals.context: Two clients match 'cindy'. Must NOT route to client agent.
evals.resolution: Multiple matches on 'cindy' → shows client disambiguation cards → after tap, shows booking cards (never auto-opens)
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Which cindy?' with client cards. After tap, shows booking(s) as cards or 'No upcoming bookings found for cindy.'

evals.context: 3 bookings exist on Friday
evals.resolution: No client → filter bookings by date → show all as cards
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Found 3 bookings:' with booking cards

evals.context: Sarah Kim has 1 booking this week
evals.resolution: Single match on 'sarah' → finds 1 booking → shows as card
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Found 1 booking for sarah:' with booking card

evals.prompt: reschedule sarah to next monday at 4pm
evals.context: Sarah Kim has 1 upcoming booking
evals.resolution: Single match on 'sarah' → resolves client → finds booking → opens edit form
evals.expected_outcome: BookingForm opens in edit mode with date changed to Monday 4pm, rescheduled=true, fields highlighted as 'AI updated'

evals.prompt: change the estimate on chris's booking to 500
evals.context: Chris Martin has 1 upcoming booking. Christina Reyes also matches 'chris'.
evals.resolution: Multiple matches on 'chris' (Chris Martin, Christina Reyes) → shows client disambiguation cards
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Which chris?' with two client cards. After tap, BookingForm opens with estimate=500 highlighted

evals.context: Chris Martin and Christina Reyes both exist
evals.resolution: Multiple matches on 'chris' → disambiguation → then find booking → edit
evals.expected_outcome: Disambiguation first, then BookingForm opens with time changed to 3pm

evals.prompt: add a new client named Taylor Swift
evals.context: No client named Taylor Swift exists
evals.resolution: No resolution needed for create
evals.expected_outcome: CreateClientForm opens with name pre-filled as 'Taylor Swift'

evals.context: No client named Mike Johnson exists
evals.resolution: No resolution needed for create
evals.expected_outcome: CreateClientForm opens with name='Mike Johnson' and phone='555-9999' pre-filled

evals.prompt: do I have a client named cindy
evals.context: Client Cindy Liu exists
evals.resolution: Single match on 'cindy' → shows as search result card (does NOT auto-navigate)
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Found a match for cindy:' with Cindy Liu card, Create New button, and search field

evals.context: Chris Martin and Christina Reyes both match
evals.resolution: Multiple matches → shows all as search result cards
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Found 2 clients matching chris:' with both client cards

evals.prompt: do I have a client named rodriguez
evals.context: No client matches 'rodriguez'
evals.resolution: No match → shows no-match UI with fuzzy suggestions
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows no-match UI with Create New button and any fuzzy suggestions

evals.context: 'Sara' doesn't exactly match anyone, but 'Sarah Kim' is close (edit distance 1)
evals.resolution: No exact match → fuzzy match finds 'Sarah Kim' as suggestion
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows no-match with Sarah Kim as a smart suggestion

evals.context: Josh Parrott exists as exact single match
evals.resolution: Single match on 'josh' → navigates directly
evals.expected_outcome: Panel closes, app navigates to Josh Parrott's client profile page

evals.context: Chris Martin and Christina Reyes both match 'chris'
evals.resolution: Multiple matches → disambiguation cards
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Which chris?' with two client cards. Tapping one navigates to that profile.

evals.context: Sarah Kim exists, single match
evals.resolution: Single match → resolves client → second AI call with current data + prompt → computes { phone: '555-1234' }
evals.expected_outcome: ClientForm opens with phone field showing '555-1234', highlighted with accent border and 'AI updated' label

evals.prompt: update josh's last name to have two t's
evals.context: Josh Parrott exists. Current name: 'Josh Parrott'. User wants 'Josh Parrottt'? Or 'Josh Parrott' already has two t's? Depends on actual data.
evals.resolution: Single match → resolves to Josh Parrott → second AI call gets current name + user request → AI computes new name value
evals.expected_outcome: ClientForm opens with name field updated to AI-computed value, highlighted as 'AI updated'

evals.context: Alex Torres exists with tags=['new']
evals.resolution: Single match → resolves to Alex Torres → second AI call sees current tags=['new'] + 'add VIP' → returns tags=['new', 'VIP']
evals.expected_outcome: ClientForm opens with tags='new, VIP', highlighted as 'AI updated'

evals.prompt: remove the returning tag from josh
evals.context: Josh Parrott has tags=['returning', 'cover-up']
evals.resolution: Single match → resolves → second AI call sees current tags + removal request → returns tags=['cover-up']
evals.expected_outcome: ClientForm opens with tags='cover-up', highlighted as 'AI updated'

evals.context: 5 bookings exist this week, 3 are Regular type
evals.resolution: No entity resolution needed → computes from bookingStore
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'You have 5 bookings this week' with booking cards. Panel stays open.

evals.prompt: how many consultations do I have this month
evals.context: 2 Consultation bookings exist this month
evals.resolution: Filters by booking_type=Consultation
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'You have 2 consultations this month'

evals.context: 3 bookings exist on Friday
evals.resolution: Filters bookings to Friday → returns list
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows '3 bookings on Friday:' with booking cards

evals.context: Working hours 10-8, some days have gaps >= 2 hours
evals.resolution: Checks each working day for gaps >= minGapForAvailable
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows available days as a bullet list

evals.prompt: give me a summary of this week
evals.context: Mix of booking types this week
evals.resolution: Aggregates bookings by type with counts and hours
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows breakdown: Regular: 3 (9h), Touch Up: 1 (2h), etc. with totals

evals.context: 2 bookings exist tomorrow
evals.resolution: Filters to tomorrow
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows '2 bookings tomorrow:' with booking cards

evals.context: Alex Torres has 1 conversation thread (Instagram only)
evals.resolution: Single match on 'alex' → resolves client → 1 conversation thread → auto-opens
evals.expected_outcome: ConversationDrawer opens showing Alex's Instagram thread

evals.context: Cindy Liu has both Instagram and Facebook conversation threads
evals.resolution: Single match on 'cindy' → resolves client → 2 conversation threads → shows platform cards
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'Cindy Liu has multiple message threads' with Instagram and Messenger cards

evals.context: Sarah Kim has no linked Instagram or Facebook PSIDs
evals.resolution: Single match on 'sarah' → resolves client → no conversation threads found
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'No conversation thread found for Sarah Kim'

evals.context: Chris Martin and Christina Reyes both match. Chris has IG thread.
evals.resolution: Multiple matches on 'chris' → disambiguation → resolves client → finds thread → shows template cards
evals.expected_outcome: After client disambiguation, panel shows template cards (Reminder, Follow-up, Reschedule). Tapping one opens ConversationDrawer with draft.

evals.context: Alex Torres has 1 IG thread
evals.resolution: Single match → resolves client → finds thread → shows template cards
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows template cards. Tapping one opens ConversationDrawer with draft text pre-filled.

evals.context: Nonsensical input
evals.resolution: Unknown agent → no resolution
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'I'm not sure what you'd like to do. Try something like...'

evals.context: Request outside app's capabilities
evals.resolution: Unknown agent → no resolution
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows 'I'm not sure what you'd like to do. Try something like...'

evals.prompt: book an appointment for kris martin
evals.context: Client is 'Chris Martin' — voice-to-text used 'kris' instead of 'chris'
evals.resolution: No exact match on 'kris martin' → fuzzy match scores 'Chris Martin' high (first name edit distance 1, last name exact) → shows as suggestion
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows no-match UI with Chris Martin as top suggestion

evals.context: Client is 'Christina Reyes' — phonetic mismatch
evals.resolution: No exact match → fuzzy match finds 'Christina Reyes' (edit distance 1 on first name) → suggestion
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows no-match UI with Christina Reyes as suggestion

evals.prompt: I need to see sarah next thursday in the afternoon
evals.context: Sarah Kim exists, single match
evals.resolution: Single match → resolves → opens booking form
evals.expected_outcome: BookingForm opens with client=Sarah Kim, date=next Thursday, timeSlot=evening (afternoon maps to evening)

evals.prompt: am I booked up on friday
evals.context: 4 bookings on Friday filling most of the day
evals.resolution: Checks Friday for availability
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows whether Friday has available slots or not

evals.prompt: push sarah's appointment to next week
evals.context: Sarah Kim has 1 upcoming booking
evals.resolution: Single match → resolves client → finds booking → but 'next week' is vague, date might not resolve cleanly
evals.expected_outcome: BookingForm opens in edit mode with rescheduled=true. Date handling depends on how AI parses 'next week'.

evals.prompt: book a touch up for chris next monday at 10am, 2 hours, estimate 200, forearm piece
evals.context: Chris Martin and Christina Reyes both match
evals.resolution: Multiple matches on 'chris' → disambiguation first, then BookingForm with all fields
evals.expected_outcome: After disambiguation, BookingForm opens with ALL entities pre-filled: type, date, duration, estimate, notes

evals.context: Ambiguous between search and open — should be 'open' (user assumes client exists)
evals.resolution: Multiple matches → disambiguation → navigates to profile
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows client disambiguation, then navigates to selected client's profile

evals.prompt: is there a client called martinez
evals.context: Phrased as a question — should be 'search' not 'open'
evals.resolution: Search → shows results as cards, never auto-navigates
evals.expected_outcome: Agent panel shows search results (or no-match with suggestions)
